hero.title: A calm spa experience that restores your body in Bodrum

about.title: Bringing calm, care, and a professional spa experience together in Bodrum
about.description: Luna Den Spa Bodrum offers guests a relaxing space where they can slow down during their holiday, rest their body, and make time for personal care. We plan massage, spa, and wellness treatments in a hygienic, warm, and attentive atmosphere.

why.title: Comfort, hygiene, and professional care in every detail
why.description: For guests who want to relax, renew, and enjoy a quality spa experience in Bodrum, we design the service flow with a calm, reliable, and thoughtful standard.

quality.title: We keep care quality high at every step
quality.description: From before the session to the moment you leave, the guest experience is planned with attention.

safety.title: We place hygiene and trust at the center
safety.description: We offer professional treatments in clean, organized, and peaceful spaces.

servicesPage.title: Massage and spa experiences that relax your body in Bodrum
servicesPage.description: At Luna Den Spa Bodrum, you can relax with massage options shaped around your needs and enjoy a calm, professional care experience.
servicesPage.listDescription: Open the relevant massage title to review the service description.

images.primaryAlt: Luna Den Spa Bodrum services visual
images.secondaryAlt: Luna Den Spa Bodrum massage services visual

swedish.title: Swedish (Classic) Massage
swedish.description: One of the most commonly preferred massage types, applied with relaxing touches to help loosen the muscles and support blood circulation.

bali.title: Balinese Massage
bali.description: Inspired by Far Eastern techniques, this special therapy supports body and mind balance with rhythmic touches and pressure techniques for deep relaxation.

deepTissue.title: Deep Tissue Massage
deepTissue.description: This therapy works on the deeper layers of muscle and connective tissue, helping reduce intense muscle tension and ease chronic discomfort.

medical.title: Medical Massage
medical.description: A targeted and therapeutic massage performed by expert therapists for musculoskeletal discomfort.

aromatherapy.title: Aromatherapy Massage
aromatherapy.description: This holistic therapy is performed with natural and special botanical oils, helping provide mental and physical relaxation while awakening the senses.

thaiMix.title: Thai Mix Massage
thaiMix.description: A dynamic therapy combining Thai and classic massage techniques, bringing flexibility and lightness to the body through stretching and pressure techniques.

sultan.title: Sultan Massage
sultan.description: A special experience where two therapists work in sync, offering deep relaxation, maximum comfort, and a unique luxury spa experience.
